getCreditsToPlay: Get credits to play more trivia games
creditsAddedToAccount: Your credits have been added to your account.
choosePaymentMethodToPurchase: Choose your payment method to purchase {{count}} credits
paypalSdkFailed: Failed to load PayPal SDK. Please check your internet connection and try again.

manualPaymentConfirmDescription: This path runs a development-style card flow on the server (no real charge). Continue only if you understand this is not a live payment processor.
creditsValueExplainer: Each credit covers one trivia question in standard modes. Time-limited games use more credits per duration (see game settings).
